case_title: MIDLAND FUNDING LLC ASSIGNEE OF CITIBANK UNIVERSAL VS. SHARON L DOUBIAGO et al

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC ASSIGNEE OF CITIBANK UNIVERSAL RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DOUBIAGO, SHARON L $13,857.97 PRINCIPAL, $2,946.24 INTEREST, $393.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $17,197.21, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT

DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 100, INCLUSIVE
